title: 2024-2025 Academic Year Orientation Days
content:
2024-2025 Academic Year Orientation Days

For our new students joining us in the 2024-2025 academic year

“2024-2025 Academic Year Üsküdar University Faculty of Medicine Orientation” will be held on Monday, September 23, 2024 between 10.00-11.00 at NP Health Campus Ibni Sina Auditorium.
